g.text: Figure 5X. Baseline-effect matrix from the official 5.3 re-estimated DID table

text.style: fill: #687782; font: 10.5px 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: Treat share is visually separated from DID-any and DID-intensity to preserve the current writing boundary: the stable core finding is about progress structure, not a blanket quality upgrade.
